allOf.description: Configuration for an Amazon S3 logging endpoint.

bucket_name.description: The name of the S3 bucket to send logs to.

access_key.description: The AWS access key ID used to authenticate.

secret_key.description: The AWS secret access key used to authenticate.

iam_role.description: The Amazon Resource Name of an IAM role to assume for S3 access.

domain.description: The domain of the S3 endpoint.

path.description: The path to store logs in the S3 bucket.

period.description: How frequently in seconds log files are finalized and sent.

gzip_level.description: The level of gzip encoding when sending logs.
